core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Editorial Print aesthetics with E-commerce utility.
Emotion First: Every interaction must feel 'expensive' and 'deliberate'.
Content is King: Products are art pieces; the UI is the gallery wall.
Negative Space: Extreme padding (p-24, p-32) to create luxury breathing room.

typography.installation: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&display=swap');

usage_rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use #0A0A0A or #121212.
Primary color is for high-contrast actions (Buy Now).
Accent color is for subtle highlights (Gold/Bronze tones for luxury feel).
Error states should be deep crimson, not bright red.

grids.marketing: Mode A: The Tetris Grid (Asymmetrical, Art-focused)
grids.shop: Mode B: Uniform Grid (3-4 columns, focus on product visibility)
grids.dashboard: Mode C: High Density Grid (Data-heavy, compact)

containers.marketing_card: No border, no shadow. Image aspect-ratio [3/4] or [4/5]. Text below image.
containers.admin_card: Flat background, 1px subtle border, sharp corners.

buttons.primary: rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold px-8 py-4 hover:bg-transparent hover:text-primary border border-primary transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold px-8 py-4 bg-transparent border border-input hover:bg-secondary transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: rounded-none border-b border-input bg-transparent px-0 py-2 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-primary placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

navigation.style: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80 border-b border-border/40 sticky top-0 z-50

cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden. Image scales slightly on hover. 'Quick Add' button slides up from bottom.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle grain overlay on backgrounds to avoid 'digital flatness'.

motion.hover: Images scale 1.05x on hover. Text links underline expands from center.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use for sticky headers and modal overlays. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark).

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with thin stroke width (stroke-width={1.5}) for elegance.

admin_panel_guidelines.style: Swiss Brutalist. High contrast. White background, black borders, bold typography.
admin_panel_guidelines.layout: Sidebar navigation (fixed). Main content area with 'High Density Grid'.
features: Dashboard: Key metrics (Sales, Orders, Customers) in bold cards.
Products: Table view with image thumbnails. 'Add Product' drawer.

implementation_steps: 1. Configure Tailwind theme in tailwind.config.js with new colors and fonts.
2. Update index.css with @import for fonts and CSS variables.
4. Build 'UI' primitives (Button, Input, Card) with custom styles.
5. Develop pages: Landing, Shop, Product Detail, Cart, Checkout.
6. Develop Admin pages: Dashboard, Products, Orders.
7. Integrate 'sonner' for toasts and 'lucide-react' for icons.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Respect the 'Jewel & Luxury' theme: High contrast, elegant typography, generous spacing.
